title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance Capital India in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance Capital India:
L&T Finance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
